GroupLabel.Name: Group {group} Display Name
GroupLabel.Hint: Override the display name shown in the token HUD and config sheets. Leave blank to use the default label.

GmSeeAll.Name: GM Sees All Groups
GmSeeAll.Hint: When enabled, the GM always sees tokens, tiles, and lights from every perception group at full visibility, regardless of their selected token. When disabled, selecting a token previews that token's perspective: anything outside its perception groups (or otherwise hidden) is dimmed rather than hidden, so the GM can still see and select it. With no token selected, everything returns to normal.

TokenConfig.SectionHint: Assign this token to one or more perception groups. Only viewer tokens sharing a matching group, or with the corresponding status effect active, will see this token.

TileConfig.SectionHint: Assign this tile to one or more perception groups. Only players whose tokens share a matching group will see this tile rendered on their canvas.

LightConfig.SectionHint: Assign this light to one or more perception groups. Only players whose tokens share a matching group will see this light and its illumination effect.

WallConfig.SectionHintDoor: Assign one or more perception groups. Players whose tokens share a matching group see and use this as a normal door. Everyone else perceives it as a solid wall instead.
WallConfig.SectionHintSecret: Assign one or more perception groups. Players whose tokens share a matching group see and use this secret door as a normal door. Everyone else still perceives a solid wall, as with any secret door.
WallConfig.SectionHintNone: This only has an effect when the wall's Door type is set to Door or Secret Door.

HUD.PanelHint: Toggle which groups this token belongs to.
